title: Grid Origination Intelligence
description: Title slide — platform name, tagline, three ISO markets

title: The Problem
description: Energy procurement at enterprise scale — no unified data, unscored risk, opaque queue depth

title: The Solution
description: Three pillars: EIA 860 (3,875 generators), queue analysis (2,433+ projects), real nodal pricing (28 months)

title: Scoring Engine
description: Eight risk dimensions — congestion, curtailment, basis, tax credit, sponsor, interconnect, capture price, revenue

title: Real Data Sources
description: ERCOT CDR (27,193 LMP rows), CAISO OASIS (1,774 nodes), EIA 860 live 2024

title: Tech Stack
description: React + Vite, Express 5, Drizzle + PostgreSQL, PyPSA OPF engine, Orval codegen

title: Live Demo
description: CTA — platform is live, PPA origination + queue siting + nodal analysis workflows
